title: National Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: National Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
